description_long: This lamp features a minimalist, modern design with a slender vertical rod descending from above, terminating in a three-pronged, Y-shaped fixture. The arms of the fixture are evenly spaced and appear to be constructed from metal, with a subtle accent of a different color at the central joint. Thin, taut cables extend from the ends of each arm to the upper rod, providing structural support and a sense of geometric balance. The lamp's overall appearance is sleek and industrial, with clean lines and a functional aesthetic. Its form suggests it is intended to be suspended from a ceiling, making it suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A sleek, modern pendant lamp with a slender rod and a three-armed Y-shaped fixture, supported by thin cables. The design is minimalist and industrial, ideal for ceiling suspension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the vertical rod and the symmetrical Y-shaped fixture with all three arms visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the Y-shaped fixture and the supporting cables, with two arms more prominent.
description_view_2: Direct view from the opposite side, again showing the full Y-shaped fixture and the central joint.
description_view_3: Angled view from the other side, emphasizing the geometric arrangement of the arms and cables.
